name: SynaticEntitySync
description: Generate entity sync plans from a Synatic org and commit them to Azure Repos, or execute a committed plan against a destination org.
helpMarkDown: See the [extension documentation](https://github.com/synatic/entity-sync-azure-devops) for setup, permissions, and examples.
author: Synatic

inputs.name: command
inputs.label: Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: Plan generates a sync plan from the source org. Execute runs preview and/or execute against the destination org.

inputs.name: apiUrl
inputs.label: Synatic API URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Synatic API base URL without a trailing slash.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.label: Synatic API key
inputs.helpMarkDown: Synatic org API key (syn_api_...). Mark as a secret when binding pipeline variables.

inputs.name: sourceOrgId
inputs.label: Source organization ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Source organization MongoDB ObjectId for the plan command.

inputs.name: rootType
inputs.label: Root type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Root entity type for plan (flow, solution, parameter, etc.). Use with Root ID, or use Roots instead.

inputs.name: rootId
inputs.label: Root ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Root entity MongoDB ObjectId for the plan command.

inputs.name: roots
inputs.label: Roots (JSON)
inputs.helpMarkDown: JSON array of `{ "rootType", "rootId" }` objects. Alternative to Root type + Root ID.

inputs.name: planPath
inputs.label: Plan path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Repository-relative path for the plan JSON file.

inputs.name: planOptions
inputs.label: Plan options (JSON)
inputs.helpMarkDown: JSON object passed to the Synatic plan API.

inputs.name: autoCommit
inputs.label: Auto commit plan
inputs.helpMarkDown: For plan: commit the generated plan files to Azure Repos.

inputs.name: createPr
inputs.label: Create pull request
inputs.helpMarkDown: For plan with auto commit: open a pull request into the base branch.

inputs.name: prTitle
inputs.label: Pull request title
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional PR title when Create pull request is enabled.

inputs.name: prBody
inputs.label: Pull request body
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional PR description when Create pull request is enabled.

inputs.name: prBaseBranch
inputs.label: PR base branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base branch for commits and pull requests.

inputs.name: commitMessage
inputs.label: Commit message
inputs.helpMarkDown: Commit message when auto commit is enabled.

inputs.name: destOrgId
inputs.label: Destination organization ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Destination organization MongoDB ObjectId for the execute command.

inputs.name: previewFirst
inputs.label: Preview first
inputs.helpMarkDown: For execute: run preview before execute.

inputs.name: previewOnly
inputs.label: Preview only
inputs.helpMarkDown: For execute: stop after preview without executing.

inputs.name: failOnConflict
inputs.label: Fail on conflict
inputs.helpMarkDown: For execute: fail when preview reports conflicts.
